name: Approved Individual Grant Procedures

eligibility.description: Grants must be scholarships, prizes, or for specific objectives awarded on an objective and nondiscriminatory basis with prior Secretary approval.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Foundations can avoid the 20% taxable expenditure tax on grants to individuals for travel or study by obtaining advance IRS approval of their grant-making procedures.
